acceptance: Unknown, malformed, wildcard, ambiguous, quoted, bare, or database-link entries fail closed. 2. With UnknownOracle, an allowlist entry leaves SELECT app_read.lookup(:id) Guarded/READ_WRITE. 3. With an independent ProvenReadOnly oracle, an exact matching entry preserves its existing Safe/READ_ONLY result; a non-listed independently-proven routine becomes Guarded/READ_WRITE. 4. The conformance test proves the configured outcome cannot be more permissive than the default classifier for listed and non-listed calls. 5. No served DEFAULT_CLASSIFIER binding or client-controlled configuration path is added.

acceptance: Valid normalized graphs exit 0 with a deterministic summary. 2. Duplicate slugs, task labels, plan labels, reused IDs, or lineage mappings fail. 3. Unknown or cross-repo-native dependency, parent, handoff, lineage, tracker, or source references fail. 4. Cross-repo handoffs require an artifact and required checksum and remain deferred at promotion. 5. Mixed parent/dependency/handoff cycles and live-plus-plan cycles fail before actionable mutation. 6. Malformed fields, paths, JSONL, UTF-8, source checksums, SemVer, types, priorities, tiers, gates, dispositions, and reuse actions fail without crashing. 7. Promoted tasks cannot depend on non-promoted native tasks. 8. New issues stage deferred; graph and lineage edges land before activation; GCP is held by default. 9. Unit and CLI tests cover validation and staging/activation order. 10. The complete live engineering-program manifest passes before bulk Bead creation.
